'''Ap'Sareb''' was a young [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]] who lived on [[Citadel Station]] some time after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. By [[3951 BBY]], Ap'Sareb was ranked fourth of the swoop racers on the station, but was later bested by the score set by [[Meetra Surik]] when she took up the sport.

{{Char-stub}}
